summary: Permissive CLI and unsafe time arithmetic could select unintended evidence or exceed the JavaScript Date domain
evidence: The baseline accepted duplicate options and noncanonical or overflowing numeric values then subtracted and added windows without saturation
resolution: Use strict native argument parsing, reject empty duplicate invalid or unsafe values, and clamp selected ranges to the Date domain
verification: Empty duplicate overflow and both Date-domain extremes passed within focused suite 21/21 and independent boundary assertions

summary: Recursive session workflow and SQLite discovery could read unbounded evidence and execute database inspection without explicit read-only timeout ceilings
evidence: The baseline recursively loaded complete session and workflow files and invoked SQLite without bounded rows buffer timeout or immutable mode
resolution: Cap discovery files bytes rows retained activities warnings and workflow tails; use time-ranged tail reads and read-only bounded SQLite inspection
verification: Tail range row timeout cap newest-retention and rollout-parser regressions passed 21/21; independent generated boundary checks approved

summary: Raw persisted evidence could disclose credentials or forge terminal and report content through quoted escaped multiline or control-split values
evidence: The baseline redactor covered only narrow literal patterns after matching while ANSI bidi zero-width C0/C1 nested escaped malformed quoted YAML private-key signed-request and provider-token forms crossed the output boundary
resolution: Canonicalize controls before matching and apply one shared recursive redactor for structured and text sinks with strict diagnostic-code preservation
verification: Persistence suite passed 29/29; independent 130-shape quote escape control and platform-error matrix found zero leaks at the approved hashes

summary: Missing or truncated sources could still be rendered as proven absence and a risk-filtered subset was labeled as all nearby agent activity
evidence: The baseline omitted stat-race failures from completeness and used broad activity wording for only matching command and tool evidence
resolution: Record every discovery and stat failure as conservative incomplete evidence, cap with warnings, and name JSON and text fields as matching risk activity only
verification: Stat-race incomplete-evidence risk-only naming and retained-activity cap regressions passed within focused suite 21/21

summary: Correlation and workflow tails could retain or render the wrong temporal slice
evidence: The baseline used unsaturated range arithmetic linear correlation and filesystem-order workflow truncation before printing the first eight retained entries
resolution: Use inclusive binary-search correlation, keep the latest 20 matches, sort workflow evidence chronologically, cap the newest 100, and render the newest eight
verification: Inclusive edge latest-20 chronological newest-retention and zero-incident range regressions passed within focused suite 21/21

summary: Configured MCP response byte cap could be exceeded and hard cuts counted JavaScript characters instead of UTF-8 bytes
evidence: Pre-fix truncation appended an unbudgeted note and sliced full text by maxBytes characters
resolution: Budget the note inside the cap and truncate only at UTF-8 code-point boundaries
verification: MCP package tests 12/12; typecheck and build passed

summary: Two advertised MCP tools could only return 401 because their API routes required cookie authentication
evidence: Runtime probes returned 401 with no auth and invalid bearer while the three public diagnostic routes returned 200
resolution: Remove the unusable tools and dead bearer query and callback plumbing; lock the public registry with a test
verification: Registry test passed; removed endpoints probed 401/401 and retained endpoints 200/200/200

summary: A zero capital base reports a 0 percent return even though the return denominator is undefined
evidence: Base line 80 uses capitalBase ? ratio : 0 while summary types already permit null
resolution: Await user decision between zero and null semantics before changing the public return contract
verification: All 161 baseline lines reviewed; no code changed

summary: Retired bridge runtime parsers value helpers and HTTP error contracts remained exported without live consumers
evidence: Full caller scan and independent review found only four runtime types still consumed by the API
resolution: Delete 570 lines of bridge-era code and the unused Node type dependency while retaining consumed types
verification: Package and API consumer typechecks; Knip production scan; frozen lockfile validation; diff check passed

summary: Historical NYSE calendars applied modern holidays before their effective dates and omitted ad-hoc exchange closures
evidence: MLK was treated as closed before 1998; Juneteenth before 2022; 2001 2004 2007 2012 2018 and 2025 closures were absent
resolution: Gate holidays by effective year and add source-confirmed ad-hoc closure dates
verification: Calendar tests 17/17; package backtest-core and backtest-worker typechecks passed

summary: Bare market-date keys could resolve to the previous New York day and impossible dates were accepted
evidence: Date construction treated YYYY-MM-DD as UTC midnight and normalized invalid calendar components
resolution: Parse bare market-date keys directly validate round-tripped components and reject unsupported years
verification: Regression coverage for bare impossible and out-of-range dates passed

summary: Callers could mutate cached holiday records early-close records and shared session descriptors
evidence: Public APIs exposed mutable objects backed by process-wide caches
resolution: Return cloned calendar records and freeze shared market-session descriptors
verification: Mutation-poisoning regression tests passed within the 17-test package suite

summary: Unknown option-right values were coerced to call and could hide a planned-versus-actual contract deviation
evidence: Both planned and actual values used a put-or-call fallback that guessed call for every unrecognized value
resolution: Reuse the canonical option-right normalizer and retain unknown as null so mismatches remain visible
verification: Current-byte reseal passed focused RED/GREEN repair matrix 33/33, complete Trade suite 115/115, exact-path diff check, and production Vite build with 3590 modules

summary: Generated boolean query schemas parsed the literal string false and arbitrary non-empty strings as true
evidence: Orval emitted z.coerce.boolean for 16 query fields; refresh=false bypassed high-beta cache reuse and strictTrade=false selected the slower broker-authoritative search path
resolution: Postprocess generated boolean queries through a strict true/false preprocessor and reject other strings
verification: API Zod tests 2/2; clean temporary Orval generation matched checked-in api.ts; api-zod build passed

summary: Walk-forward sweeps materialized the complete Cartesian parameter grid before deciding to use bounded random sampling
evidence: buildCandidatesForMode called buildGridCandidates first and checked the resulting length afterward; dimension products could exhaust memory before the 100-candidate fallback
resolution: Count dimension cardinality first and enter the existing bounded sampler as soon as it exceeds 100
verification: Backtest-core tests 34/34; backtest-core TypeScript build passed; regression proves oversized grids are not materialized

summary: Selected terminal backtest runs kept polling full detail and chart payloads every five seconds
evidence: Both queries used a visibility-only refetch interval even after completed failed or canceled status; a visible terminal run issued up to 24 detail and 24 chart requests every two minutes
resolution: Retain five-second polling for mutable statuses and stop both heavy queries after terminal status
verification: Focused polling test passed 1/1; full Pyrus TypeScript check passed

summary: Backtest study previews loaded the same ordered point series twice when latest and best selected the same run
evidence: getBacktestStudyPreviewChart independently called loadRunPoints for latest and best on every five-second preview poll even when both IDs matched
resolution: Share the in-flight point-series promise for identical run IDs while keeping distinct reads parallel
verification: Backtesting service tests passed 4/4; full API TypeScript check passed; regression records one loader call

summary: Flow request filtering parsed expiration and evaluated every snapshot row before slicing to the requested limit
evidence: The default all-events path constructed dates and computed unusualness for up to 1000 rows even when only 50 results were requested; filter().slice() could not stop early
resolution: Short-circuit unused filters reuse one clock value and stop iterating as soon as the normalized result limit is reached
verification: Focused and historical-flow tests passed 7/7; API typecheck passed; 1000-row/50-result microbenchmark improved from 1013.4 ms to 3.2 ms over 2000 iterations

summary: Optionability fallback query size scaled with the raw priority-symbol list instead of the five-row verifier batch
evidence: A live-shaped 500-symbol priority list produced query limits of 5 then 505 even when the priority query accepted no rows
resolution: Retain the existing four-times duplicate-listing cushion without adding the raw priority-list cardinality
verification: Regression changed captured query limits from [5,505] to [5,20]; API typecheck passed

summary: Verifier interval and batch environment values accept any positive integer and can silently amplify provider and database demand
evidence: Defaults are 60000 ms and 5 rows but positiveInteger imposes no minimum interval or maximum batch and the environment reader is also unbounded
resolution: Choose defensible minimum interval and maximum batch ceilings before adding configuration clamps
verification: Full 806-line baseline file reviewed; runtime defaults and construction path traced through platform.ts

summary: Startup still preloaded the obsolete 1332-line Market screen even though the visible market route rendered MarketDemoScreen
evidence: The market loader resolved MarketScreen while the route wrapper and active UI used MarketDemoScreen; Vite warmup also imported the obsolete module
resolution: Point the loader wrapper and warmup at MarketDemoScreen and delete the unreachable MarketScreen implementation
verification: Market preload and boot tests passed 14/14; Pyrus typecheck and production Vite build passed with one MarketDemoScreen chunk and no MarketScreen chunk

summary: The retained Market screen kept a one-second clock interval alive while another route was visible
evidence: RegimeTopBar received live=true outside safe QA regardless of isVisible so hidden retained instances continued updating state every second
resolution: Gate the clock on screen visibility and refresh it immediately when the screen resumes

resolution: Remove the persistence provider implementation and two dependencies and delete the retired unscoped cache key on boot

summary: The signed-out brand column could remain on its opener-safe static mark after the neural opener released WebGL ownership
evidence: Commit 1a7a11d0 moved the conditional out of reactive LoginShell but retained only a one-time state snapshot in BootBrandColumn; the store published changes but no rerender consumed them

summary: The unused 3D Pyrus mark path retained a WebGL renderer and its supporting runtime in the application graph
evidence: No render caller constructed the 3D mark or scene; only the colocated reduced-motion hook had live source consumers

evidence: Repository caller scans found no live source imports for either wrapper

summary: Persistent header and idle sign-in branding spent continuous WebGL or SVG animation work after loading completed
evidence: The header mounted BrandResolve continuously, the idle signed-out column could select it, and the canonical SVG mark retained infinite ring animations
resolution: Use the static canonical mark for persistent and idle branding, reserve BrandResolve for active loading, and remove the infinite ring loops

summary: The visually hidden idle sign-in loading bar continued running its slide animation
evidence: Runtime animation inspection found pyrus-loading-slide running after the sign-in form settled even though the non-status loading region was hidden
resolution: Pause the loading-bar animation whenever the loading container no longer exposes role=status
verification: Regression failed before and passed after the rule; focused checks passed 16/16; Pyrus typecheck and production build passed; desktop and mobile QA reported no running idle animations

summary: The shared modal shells implemented incompatible focus dismissal and scroll behavior by hand
evidence: BottomSheet and Drawer had no focus trap and reran their focus effect whenever inline onClose callbacks changed; ConfirmDialog did not coordinate nested Escape or body locking with the sheet layers
resolution: Delegate modal behavior to the installed Radix Dialog primitive and bridge focus return for callers that do not own a Radix trigger
verification: Regression passed 2/2; Pyrus typecheck and production build passed; mobile and desktop browser QA verified stable focus Tab wrapping nested Escape pending dismissal focus return and reference-counted scroll locks

summary: Collapsed docked-sheet controls remained reachable by keyboard while hidden from the accessibility tree
evidence: aria-hidden opacity and pointer-events do not remove eagerly mounted descendant controls from sequential or programmatic focus
resolution: Apply the native inert attribute to the collapsed body while retaining eager mounting and the existing reveal transition
verification: Regression passed 2/2; Pyrus typecheck and production build passed; both browser viewports rejected focus while collapsed and accepted it after expansion

summary: Malformed percent escapes in a route segment crashed the shared loading status and risked exposing raw account-like path text if recovered unsafely
evidence: The unguarded decodeURIComponent call raised URIError for DU12345% before identifier masking could run
resolution: Catch decoding failures at the segment boundary and fail closed to :id while preserving valid account UUID and numeric masking
verification: Malformed-route regression and valid masking matrix passed 1/1; Pyrus typecheck and production build passed; diff check passed

summary: A loading record suppressed simultaneous explicit failure stale delayed fallback unavailable and degraded states
evidence: The pending-only early return ran before all problem-state collectors; a loading record with sourceStatus error incorrectly returned no issues
resolution: Remove the redundant loading early return so a loading-only record naturally stays quiet while independently reported problem states remain visible
verification: Regression was RED before and passed after; relevant resilience and Account marker tests passed 13/13; Pyrus typecheck and production build passed; independent review approved

summary: Moving an expanded table detail between rows without changing item count retained stale virtualizer measurements
evidence: The stable estimate callback prevented remeasurement when detail position or height changed at the same count; the old row stayed oversized and the new detail could be clipped
resolution: Derive a stable key from normalized detail row positions and sizes and remeasure only when that semantic layout key changes
verification: Behavior regression was RED before and passed after; unchanged-key control retained the cache; Pyrus typecheck and production build passed; two independent reviews approved

summary: Client diagnostic uploads could persist credentials account identifiers raw render messages and component stacks without redaction
evidence: AppContent and PlatformErrorBoundary serialized events directly; API ingestion only compacted values; the existing string redactor also missed DU account IDs
resolution: Reuse one recursive redacting upload helper for all client-event producers and recognize U and DU account IDs case-insensitively
verification: Account and upload regressions were RED before and passed 2/2 after; related checks passed 10/10; Pyrus typecheck and production build passed; independent review approved

summary: Missing or crossed quote inputs rendered confident spread values and missing signal metrics rendered as zero
evidence: Number(null) and Number of an empty string yielded zero; the spread resolver clamped a negative crossed spread to zero; a live one-sided quote could display a missing bid as 200 percent or a missing ask as zero
resolution: Reject null and empty numeric inputs before coercion and return unavailable for crossed quotes while preserving the existing equal-quote boundary
verification: Three regressions were RED before and passed after; signal-language tests passed 25/25; Pyrus typecheck and production build passed; independent review approved

summary: Enter or Space on nested sort buttons in reorderable headers started keyboard dragging instead of sorting
evidence: The whole-header drag refactor stopped registering dnd-kit's activator node; KeyboardSensor only rejects bubbled descendant key events when that ref exists
resolution: Register the whole header as both sortable node and activator with the installed combined-ref hook and strip button-only drag ARIA from the columnheader
verification: Regression was RED before and passed after; installed dnd-kit keyboard and pointer paths were independently verified; Pyrus typecheck and production build passed

summary: F-prefixed IBKR family-account identifiers remained visible in crash diagnostic strings
evidence: The string redactor recognized U and DU account identifiers but its D?U-only pattern left F24680 unchanged

evidence: Disabled buttons do not receive focus; nested disabled buttons were not detected; copying a 24px inline height prevented a responsive 44px child from sizing its wrapper

summary: Persisted or posted fields could escape the generated Markdown transcript and forge headings or metadata

verification: Focused integration passed 1/1; persisted and posted sender timestamp seq and CR-line injection assertions passed

summary: The write boundary accepted undocumented payloads, unstable parse failures, replacement-decoded bytes, and an inaccurate body limit
evidence: Baseline accepted plain text and header-derived senders, substring-matched JSON, counted UTF-16 code units, and destroyed oversized sockets; replacement-mode HTTP decoding admitted invalid UTF-8
resolution: Require application/json objects, cap raw bytes, fatally decode UTF-8, return stable 400 413 and 415 responses, and drain rejected requests
verification: Focused integration passed 1/1; JSON shape, malformed raw UTF-8, multibyte cap, and 400 413 415 assertions passed

summary: Unterminated, blank, invalid, or forged JSONL rows could corrupt messages and destabilize issued cursors
evidence: Baseline appended directly after unterminated tails, derived seq from valid-message count, let persisted seq win, and removed blank rows before indexing; malformed UTF-8 was replacement-decoded
resolution: Isolate startup and live tails, preserve every physical row index, fatally decode and validate each row, overwrite persisted seq, and return the appended physical cursor
verification: Focused integration passed 1/1; invalid and blank rows, blank repair, malformed UTF-8, forged seq, startup tail, live tail, and returned cursor assertions passed

summary: Code-unit truncation, malformed Unicode, unsafe controls, and replacement decoding could corrupt text or exceed declared caps
evidence: Baseline sender message and preview slices could split astral characters and a nominal 160-character preview emitted 162; unpaired surrogates and NUL or other controls crossed persisted or posted boundaries
resolution: Cap by Unicode code points, budget the suffix inside the preview ceiling, fatally decode bytes, and reject malformed Unicode and disallowed controls
verification: Focused integration passed 1/1; astral caps, 160-code-point preview, unpaired surrogates, all 62 disallowed controls, and persisted and HTTP invalid UTF-8 assertions passed

summary: Malformed read options could silently dump the full chat history and raw fields could forge terminal records
evidence: Baseline accepted missing unknown duplicate and nonnumeric option pairs; tail zero also sliced from negative zero; messages printed embedded newlines C0/C1 controls and bidirectional controls without containment
resolution: Validate known paired options normalize timestamps apply an explicit zero-tail result and escape every rendered field onto one physical line
verification: TDD reproduced a 141696-byte false-success dump; regressions passed 2/2; hostile and normal CLI smoke checks syntax Prettier and diff checks passed

summary: The API codegen drift guard omitted a generated public Zod index

summary: Calibration JSON and Markdown were truncated in place with default-readable permissions

verification: Atomic replacement and exact private-mode regression passes; the source carries a ponytail manifest upgrade path if pair-atomic consumers appear

summary: A nominal commit persisted deployment strategy config shared signal-monitor config and two audit records through five independent writes
